            exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_set (by fun_prop) fun s hs => by
              exact (norm_sum_le _ _).trans (sum_le_sum fun i _ => sum_le_sum fun j _ => by
                exact norm_mul_le _ _)
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, ∑ i, ∑ j, |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          simp [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg]
      _ ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_set (by fun_prop) fun t ht => by
            exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_set (by fun_prop) fun s hs => by
              exact sum_le_sum fun i _ => sum_le_sum fun j _ => by
                have h1 : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := hdiff i
                have h2 : |y j - x j| ≤ ε := hdiff j
                have h3 : |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
                  apply mpb
                calc
                  |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
                    ≤ ε * ε * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by gcongr
                  _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by gcongr
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]
      _ = (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, 1 := by
          simp [intervalIntegral.integral_mul_left]
      _ = (n^2 : ℝ) * ε^2 * (1 / 2) := by
          simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const, intervalIntegral.integral_interval_oc]
      _ = (n^2 / 2) * ε^2 := by ring

have h1 : ∀ s ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, |g'' s| ≤ n^2 * ε^2 := by
      intro s hs
      calc
        |g'' s| = |∑ i, ∑ j, (y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := rfl
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, |(y i - x i) * (y j - x j) * (nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          exact (norm_sum_le _ _).trans (by simp [Finset.sum_sum])
        _ = ∑ i, ∑ j, |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by
          simp [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, ε * ε * 1 := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro j _
          have hxi : |x i - y i| ≤ ε := hdiff i
          have hyi : |y i - x i| = |x i - y i| := by simp [abs_sub_comm]
          rw [hyi] at hxi
          have hxj : |x j - y j| ≤ ε := hdiff j
          have hyj : |y j - x j| = |x j - y j| := by simp [abs_sub_comm]
          rw [hyj] at hxj
          have hmp : |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| ≤ 1 := by
            apply mpb
          calc
            |y i - x i| * |y j - x j| * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)|
              ≤ ε * ε * |(nth_partial i <| nth_partial j f) ((1 - s) • x + s • y)| := by gcongr
            _ ≤ ε * ε * 1 := by gcongr
        _ = ∑ i, ∑ j, ε^2 := by ring
        _ = n^2 * ε^2 := by
          simp [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, nsmul_eq_mul]
    calc
      ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, n^2 * ε^2 := by
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_le_integral
        · exact fun t _ => intervalIntegral.intervalIntegrable_const
        · intro t ht s hs
          exact h1 s ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩
      _ = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t * (n^2 * ε^2) := by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_const]
      _ = n^2 * ε^2 * ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, t := by
        simp [mul_comm, intervalIntegral.integral_mul_left]
      _ = n^2 * ε^2 * (1 / 2) := by
        simp [intervalIntegral.integral_id]
      _ = n^2 / 2 * ε^2 := by ring
